name: Lentil Salad with Lemon Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss fruit such as diced papaya, mango, and kiwi into the salad for variety.
2. Pomegranate seeds also make a luscious garnish.
3. Rinse lentils in a large pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil.
4. Add carrot, onion, bay leaf, garlic, and salt. Lower heat and simmer until lentils are tender, about 20 to 25 minutes.
5. Drain lentils and save the stock for soup.
6. Roast bell peppers on a baking sheet or in an aluminum foil bag over medium-high broiler for about 7 minutes.
7. Peel, seed, and core the peppers; dice them.
8. Combine diced peppers with lentil mixture in a large bowl.
9. Pour vinaigrette over the salad and toss.
10. Add herbs and toss.
11. Crumble crumbled feta cheese on top and serve.
Yield: Makes 6 servings.
